description: Tier B (real-world): based on AWS RDS Multi-AZ failover pattern — replica lag spikes during promotion causing read queries to return stale data then timeout
source: Based on AWS RDS Multi-AZ failover incident patterns and public postmortems

logs.message: psycopg2.OperationalError: could not connect to server: Connection refused (host=rds-replica.us-east-1.rds.amazonaws.com)
sqlalchemy.exc.OperationalError: (psycopg2.OperationalError) SSL connection has been closed unexpectedly
Read replica lag: 847 seconds — falling back to primary
sqlalchemy.exc.TimeoutError: QueuePool limit reached after falling back from replica
RDS event: Multi-AZ failover initiated — promoting replica rds-replica-2 to primary

alert.detail: Database read replica unavailable — application falling back to primary, connection pool saturated

expected_root_cause: RDS Multi-AZ failover causing replica lag and connection exhaustion
